title: audit — closed set of audited event names
description: The closed set of `event` column values accepted by AuditObserver::creating. Union of vendor default events + registered custom transitions. Regenerated at boot from `AuditedEventsCatalog::build()`. AuditObserver validates the event column against this set + refuses unknown values with NOTIFICATIONS_AUDIT_UNKNOWN_EVENT_TYPE.

vendor_defaults.name: deleted
vendor_defaults.description: Model row deleted (hard delete OR soft-delete via SoftDeletes trait). Vendor default.

vendor_defaults.name: restored
vendor_defaults.description: Soft-deleted model row restored. Vendor default. Only fires for models composing SoftDeletes.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: auth.login
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: User authenticated. Registered by auth::UserLoggedInAuditableTransition. Auditable_type = User::class.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: auth.logout
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: User logged out (explicit; session-expiry doesn't emit this).

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: auth.mfa_challenge_failed
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: User FAILED an MFA challenge. Compliance signal for anomaly detection.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: auth.impersonation_started
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: Platform-admin initiated impersonation session for a User. old_values has actor context, new_values has impersonation target.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: consent.granted
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: Subject granted consent to a specific category. Registered by compliance::ConsentGrantedAuditableTransition.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: consent.revoked
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: Subject revoked consent to a category.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: transaction.approved
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: Financial transaction approved (state machine transition, not a column update). Registered by finance::TransactionApprovedAuditableTransition.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: read.phi_record
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: PHI-adjacent record accessed. HIPAA §164.312(b) requires audit for reads (not just writes). Registered by planned Wave 7+ health module.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: audit.purged
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: Meta-audit — PurgeExpiredAuditsJob completed a per-tenant purge. new_values contains { cutoff_at, row_count, duration_ms }.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: audit.raw_diff_revealed
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: Chain-of-custody meta-audit — a compliance officer revealed old_values + new_values on a specific audit row via ?include=raw_diff. new_values contains { audit_id, revealer_user_id, reason }.

custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.name: audit.exported
custom_transitions_planned_wave_6.description: Meta-audit — an audit export completed. new_values contains { export_id, kind, row_count, requester }.

registration_seam: Vendor `OwenIt\Auditing\Auditable::registerAuditableTransition($name, $resolver)`. Consumer modules call this in their ServiceProvider::boot() to register additional events. AuditedEventsCatalog::build() reads from the vendor's internal registry at boot to compose this catalog.
